body.title: /sorted consequence-check: add cost-impact field for spawn designs
body.result: added spawn/dispatch cost trigger + Worst-case token spend required section to /sorted Step 5.5 and Invariants
body.description:
Add a required 'worst-case token spend' field to the consequence-check ticket template in /sorted, triggered when the batch includes any design involving dispatch, escalation, or spawning. Field asks: what is the per-failure token spend? Is there a hard cap? What is the blast radius if the failure loops?

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/sorted (consequence ticket shape in Step 5.5)
**Design rules:** additive only — don't change existing fields, add one new section
**Scope boundary:** in: new field in consequence ticket template, trigger condition (dispatch/spawn keywords). out: enforcement (that's audit-design's job)
**Completion criteria:** (1) /sorted consequence ticket for a design mentioning 'dispatch' includes 'Worst-case token spend' field; (2) field is required (not optional) when trigger fires; (3) skill updated and documented
